name: Cornered Fool
additional_info: Despite what the description states, this applies Taunt for 6 seconds. Every point of Charisma below 85 will reduce the duration of this Taunt by 0.035 seconds, capping at a minimum of 5.12 seconds with 60 Charisma. The Taunt damage buff is also applied to the attack that guard broke. 15 second cooldown.
desc: Blockbreaking a Charmed opponent procs Taunt for 5s, making them take and deal more damage.
